title: Dan Ives Says ‘Market Is Mispricing’ MSFT Stock — Here’s Why
sentences: Dan Ives Says ‘Market Is Mispricing’ MSFT Stock — Here’s Why Wedbush’s Dan Ives stays bullish on Microsoft, Alphabet and the broader AI trade, calling current market sentiment an underestimation of the next phase of Big Tech growth.
